steps.title: Understand what the blank must express
steps.content:
The sentence says the all-female cast ______ an array of female characters. The surrounding context — an all-female cast, an array of female character roles — signals that the blank needs to describe the cast being made up of those characters, not acting toward them.
  • Choice A — engulfs: Would mean the cast encloses or overwhelms the characters — no sense of composition is conveyed. ✗
  • Choice B — encourages: Would mean the cast inspires the characters — nothing in the text supports that reading. ✗
  • Choice C — comprises: Means "is composed of" — the cast is these female characters. Fits perfectly. ✓
  • Choice D — provokes: Would mean the cast incites or angers the characters — no basis in the text. ✗

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Only "comprises" captures the composition relationship the sentence requires. That is the correct answer.
